description: Style Note enamor's range of flirty and pretty nightdresses are quite impressive. Capturing the mood of the season in the colours, fabric and designs, your beauty sleep is is made even more comfortable by this range. Enjoy the obvious cutesy look of this pink nightdress. Product Details Maroon robe, has a sash to tie around the waist and insert pockets near the waist on the sides and sash inside that can be tied to hold the robe in place Material and Care Fabric: 100% polyester Trims: 79% nylon, 11% elastane and 10% rayon Hand wash Do not bleach Do not iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size L
